posts.author: EliSider (Eli Sider)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Please allow creation of folders for automations. We have 60+ automations on our board and it’s extremely tedious to go through them all each time, especially since wha’t is written into the search bar isn’t saved.

What are you trying to achieve

Be able to go through automations, find and edit them with ease
